_comment: Brand-domain registry. Keys are canonical OpenAPI tag strings (must match Endpoints.php tag exactly); values are admin-UI metadata (human label, slug for tab data attribute / URL hash, accent colour). Brand-positioning rule: astrology first (Western, then Vedic), then Numerology, Tarot, Human Design, Forecast, Biorhythm, I Ching, Crystals, Dreams, Angel Numbers. Languages, Location, and Usage at the end. Any OpenAPI tag with no entry here falls through to the catch-all Other tab, so every tag in Endpoints.php needs a row. New OpenAPI tag = new entry here, then npm run generate; no PHP edits required.
